headline: AMD (AMD) Signs Rackspace Deal To Build 30 MW Enterprise AI Cloud
summary: AMD (NasdaqGS:AMD) and Rackspace signed a multi year agreement to build dedicated AMD powered Enterprise AI Cloud infrastructure. The partnership focuses on governed and accountable AI compute for regulated sectors, including healthcare. The deal targets a phased rollout of 30 MW of AMD based data center capacity for AI workloads. AMD becomes the silicon partner for Rackspace's global governed AI infrastructure offering. For investors watching AMD, this agreement relates to the company’s...

headline: AI Chips Update - Advancing European AI with Bull and Foxconn Collaboration
summary: Bull and Foxconn have reached a significant milestone in their collaboration to advance AI infrastructure in Europe with the production of key components using the NVIDIA Vera Rubin NVL72 platform. This development marks a significant step in manufacturing AI systems in Europe, primarily processed at Foxconn's Czech facilities and completed at Bull’s plant in France. Designed to cater to demanding AI workloads, these systems aim to support cloud providers and AI factories across Europe. The...

headline: EigenQ and Silicon Valley Acquisition Corp. Announce Definitive Business Combination Agreement to Create a Publicly Traded Quantum Technology Company
summary: EigenQ Inc. ("EigenQ" or the "Company"), a quantum technology company, and Silicon Valley Acquisition Corp. (NASDAQ: SVAQ) ("SVAQ"), a publicly traded blank check company, announced today that they have entered into a definitive Business Combination Agreement ("Business Combination Agreement") that is expected to result in EigenQ becoming a publicly traded company.

content.title: EigenQ and Silicon Valley Acquisition Corp. Announce Definitive Business Combination Agreement to Create a Publicly Traded Quantum Technology Company
content.summary: EigenQ Inc. ("EigenQ" or the "Company"), a quantum technology company, and Silicon Valley Acquisition Corp. (NASDAQ: SVAQ) ("SVAQ"), a publicly traded blank check company, announced today that they have entered into a definitive Business Combination Agreement ("Business Combination Agreement") that is expected to result in EigenQ becoming a publicly traded company.
